description: A nocturnal urban street scene depicting a rain-slicked boulevard in a European city. A tall monumental column or clock tower stands prominently at center right, illuminated by greenish-yellow street lamps. The wet pavement reflects the lights and the dark turquoise-green sky. Horse-drawn carriages and small figures of pedestrians move along the street. Buildings with lit shop fronts line the far side. The overall palette is dominated by deep greens, blues, and warm amber highlights from the artificial lighting.
